first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations. The justification and strengths sections are substantively the same, with only minor wording changes and reordering that fall within typical run-to-run noise. The concerns are also conceptually identical, focusing on the candidate's lack of director-level and large-scale strategic experience. The slight rephrasing of one concern from "large-scale AI or cloud platforms" to "large organizations or advising strategic customers" is a minor shift in emphasis on the same core issue, not the introduction of a new, unfounded criticism tied to the university change.
